props.title: Twoslash Handoff
props.description: Magic move explains the build-up, twoslash appears on the final teaching state

props.label: Checkout Webhook
props.description: A raw JSON body arrives from the payments gateway

props.label: Parse and Narrow
props.story: Magic move introduces the parser incrementally, then twoslash takes over once the final typed shape settles.

magicMoveSteps.code:
declare const rawBody: string
const event = JSON.parse(rawBody)
magicMoveSteps.title: Raw Parse
magicMoveSteps.story: Start from the least safe version so viewers can see where type uncertainty begins.
magicMoveSteps.speaker: Narrator

magicMoveSteps.title: Runtime Guard
magicMoveSteps.story: Next we add a type predicate to narrow unknown input before using the payload.
magicMoveSteps.speaker: Dev

magicMoveSteps.title: Final Typed State
magicMoveSteps.story: After this final transform, the renderer swaps to twoslash so inline type callouts stay inspectable.
magicMoveSteps.speaker: Narrator

props.label: Handoff Moment
props.body: This node demonstrates the exact runtime handoff: magic-move animation first, then twoslash output after the last animation ends.

props.label: Immediate Twoslash
props.story: No magic steps means twoslash is rendered immediately.
